subject: Re:
body:
buy some good apt in brazil. ,,send more photos

----- Original Message ----
From: Fabi! <fabiehle@yahoo.com.br>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 8, 2007 10:00:47 PM
Subject: 

Hey!!!
  Brazil is always nice isn`t it?!! I miss home sooo much!! So, where did u go there? Sao Paulo, Rio?
  I`m going now, 31 of jan. So happy!!
  But I`m coming back here in march.Thanks God, I`m working really well here.
   
  It can sounds weird but... heheh I have a question, I dono if u can help me.
  Since I`m working well here, I`m making a good money. And since I never had this amount of money I dono what to do with it!!! Just wanna to ask if that is possible to u give me some "tips" about where I can invest it or anything else.... Can u? 
  I know this is about work but, just dono what to do and u are the only one that I know that could help me with this.
   
  Kissssesss!!!
